## Freed v26.3.1200

Daily changelog grouping and fB/IG scraper windows instead of moving them off-screen now stays out of the way

### Features

- Group changelog cards by CalVer day

### Downloads

**macOS:** `.dmg` (Apple Silicon or Intel, signed + notarized)  
**Windows:** `.exe` (NSIS installer)  
**Linux:** `.AppImage`  

> macOS downloads are signed and notarized for normal Gatekeeper installation.
